purpose: Append-only work journal. Read first to understand recent context. Each new task → append entry to logs[]. NEVER delete past entries.

usage.readBeforeStart: Always read this file + architecture_AIG.json + roadmap_AIG.json BEFORE doing any work, to load context.
usage.appendOnComplete: After completing any task, append a new entry to logs[] with timestamp, type, what, files, status. Do not modify existing entries.

logEntrySchema.type: feature | fix | docs | chore | brand | ops | research | plan | refactor
logEntrySchema.title: 1-line summary
commits: array of git commit hashes if any

logs.title: Project status overview report
logs.what: Compiled full plan/status snapshot — 2 plans (Phase 1 MVP + Dashboard real data) both complete, 8/8 phases done; documented post-plan Vercel stabilization series (7+ commits) not yet in changelog
logs.concerns: project-changelog.md last updated 2026-03-15, missing Pencil redesign + Vercel stabilization entries

logs.title: Brand guidelines v1.0 created (then v1.1)
logs.what: Restructured Notion source RTF (textutil convert) into brand book at .claude/brand-guidelines.md. Sections: Quick Reference, Truth (KEPT VERBATIM), Visual Identity (extracted from Pencil dashboard: #FF8400/#F2F3F0/JetBrains Mono), Voice & Tone, Content Pillars (KEPT VERBATIM), Proof Points (KEPT VERBATIM), Competitor Positioning (MoonPay only), Messaging Framework, Tóm lại 1 câu (KEPT VERBATIM). v1.1: removed Aituvi section per user feedback (not relevant); renumbered subsections.
logs.concerns: .claude/ is gitignored — guidelines file is local-only

logs.title: AIG logo asset bundle (5 SVG + 8 PNG)
logs.what: Hand-crafted SVG (Gemini API quota exhausted, pivoted from logo-design skill). Concept: AIG wordmark in JetBrains Mono Bold + orange #FF8400 dot (terminal cursor / payload passthrough metaphor). Variants: wordmark horizontal/darkmode/monochrome, icon mark (gateway frame + dot), favicon (heavier stroke for 16-32px). Pre-rendered PNGs via rsvg-convert (librsvg) — ImageMagick had SVG rendering issues. Installed font-jetbrains-mono and librsvg via Homebrew. README documents variants, color/typography spec, re-render commands.
logs.concerns: SVG <text> depends on JetBrains Mono being installed on renderer. For production web/print, convert text→outlined paths via Inkscape (deferred per user).

logs.title: Created 3 anchor context JSON files
logs.what: Created architecture_AIG.json (system map), roadmap_AIG.json (phases + status), status_AIG.json (this file — append-only log). Convention: read all 3 BEFORE starting any work, append to status_AIG.json AFTER completing each task.
